sizing_rule.note: Optimal f derived from Black-Scholes model using volatility (V), time decay (L as fraction of year), current price (Q), and underlying price (U). Position size calculated via EXP() function with X standard deviations applied to ln(Q) ± (X × V × √L) and Cumulative Normal Distribution N(). Requires predetermined option exit date. Specific optimal_f value not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Determine optimal f for options by first establishing whether you will be out of the option by a definite date, then using the Black-Scholes pricing model with volatility and time decay parameters to calculate position sizing.
